name: @openguardrails/instrumentation-claude-code
description: OpenGuardrails (OGR) command-approval gate for Claude Code — a PreToolUse hook plugin that denies risky tool calls even in bypass mode.

scripts.build: esbuild hooks/ogr-hook.src.mjs --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=hooks/ogr-hook.mjs --banner:js="// GENERATED by 'npm run build' from hooks/ogr-hook.src.mjs — do not edit by hand."
